title: MOPHOEXII MOOCY Ski Bag,Ski Bags for Air Travel,Unpadded Snow Ski Bags Fit Skis Up to 200cm,Ski Carrying Bag for Adults, and Children
features: Premium Material:Made of premium high-density 600D polyester, the ski bag offers reliable, long-lasting strength. Even more, the bag can keep skis dry for a long day thanks to the waterproof PVC lining

Comfort & Durable:The ski travel bag is built to last for the long haul, with padded burly carrying handles , to make your journey comfortable and easy to carry ski equipment when you travel. The internal strap protects the ski poles and stops it from sliding around in the bag

Adjustable design:The ski bags for air travel features innovative roll-top technology that allows you to adjust the length of your large cross-country ski bag from approximately 170 cm (rolled up) to 200 cm (unrolled). This long ski cover can accommodate a pair of Nordic or downhill skis and poles

Space-saving:The MOPHOEXII roll top ski travel bags are a real space saver and offer storage space for 1 pair of downhill or cross-country skis up to 68.9 inches (175 cm), and a pair of ski pole as well. This bag can also be folded into a small item, which is very light and does not take up space

Unpadded Ski Carrying Bags are Backed by MOPHOEXII's Satisfaction Guarantee:All of our ski bags come with a one year manufacturer's warranty. If for any reason you are not satisfied with your purchase, please contact us and we will resolve the issue for you
description: Product Description High quality The ski travel bag is made of durable 600D polyester material making the adult ski bag durable on every trip. Key Features Roll Top Adjusts Length The cross country ski bags and boot bags feature innovative roll top technology, allowing you to adjust the length of the large cross country ski bag from approximately 170cm (rolled) up to 203cm (unrolled) Ease of Carry MOPHOEXII Single Ski Bag has added extra long handles with padded comfort to make it easier to carry. Self-repairing Our Ski Sleeve (unpadded) has self repairing nylon coiled zipper that ensures that it is hard wearing and will last for more winter sports trips. Product Description MOPHOEXII Ski Bag Ideal gift for Christmas, New year. Benefits of skiing! What are the health benefits of downhill and cross-country skiing? Alpine skiing and extreme skiing can have amazing benefits for your health, including improved flexibility, improved mood and lower body strength! What are you going to bring to the ski resort this year? Winter is finally here, which means it's time to start getting all your gear ready for one of the most anticipated winter activities of the year - skiing! The new collection has just arrived in stores and is ready for your adventures. Product Details: Material: 600D Polyester Measurements (LxWxH): 74.8" x 13.8" x 5.9" / 190 x 35 x 15 cm Hand wash only - it is NOT suitable for the washing machine. SCOPE OF DELIVERY 1x ski bag
